description: Add task status tracking and filtering.

userStories.title: Add task status persistence
userStories.description: As a developer, I want each task to store a status with a pending default so that task progress persists for new and existing tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a status field to task storage with allowed values 'pending', 'in_progress', and 'done'
Existing tasks default to 'pending' after the migration or backfill runs
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose task status in shared task data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want task status included in shared task types and task list responses so that UI features can read and render it consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list payloads include the task status field
Shared task types accept only pending, in_progress, or done values
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Allow updating task status from task list logic
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task status so that I can keep task progress up to date from the list experience.
acceptanceCriteria: A task status update action accepts pending, in_progress, and done values
Saving a new status persists the change and returns the updated task state
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badges on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to display its current status so that I can scan progress without opening task details.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done states
Badge styling changes when the task status changes in list data
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task status control to task list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want an inline task status control so that I can change status directly from the task list.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row exposes a control for pending, in progress, and done
Changing the control saves the selected status and refreshes the visible task state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: The task list exposes All, Pending, In Progress, and Done filter options
Selecting a filter shows only tasks that match the chosen status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
